text: Wiki weekly maintenance 2026-06-14: ingested 3 docs/ files into wiki/. SAR + adversarial reviews became wiki/sources/ entries that document the security/architecture decisions baked into the plugin; WordPress.org submission doc became a wiki/guides/ runbook for the maintainer release flow. Lint clean after renaming sources to match doc stems and updating all wikilinks.
Wiki ingest: SAR + Adversarial review docs (2026-06-14)

Wiki weekly maintenance 2026-06-17: ingested two new guides — wp-env smoke test runbook (docs/SMOKE-TEST.md, Colima + path-with-spaces symlink fix, PHPUnit/Jest/release-zip verification) and RapidSOS Cloudways deploy runbook (docs/RAPIDSOS-DEPLOY.md, Bricks + Logo Collections + cache purge + rollback). Both placed in wiki/guides/ alongside existing wordpress-org-submission.md. Lint clean; no dead wikilinks. docs/WORDPRESS-ORG-SUBMISSION.md already mirrored to wiki/guides/ on 2026-06-14.
Wiki ingest: wp-env smoke test + RapidSOS deploy (2026-06-17)

WP.org submission prep v1.2.12 complete (2026-06-22). Splide vendored under lib/splide/, directory PNGs, readme polish. Local wp-env Docker verified: strip post 4 with demo-50-logos collection, carousel page 62 with vendored Splide (no CDN). Plugin Check passes on release-shaped run with --slug=cooper-bold-logo-soup and dev-dir excludes. Key lesson: logo URLs must be same-origin (Media Library) for hydration; external URLs fail CORS. Branch main ahead 2 commits unpushed; uncommitted Plugin Check micro-fixes in readme.txt and renderer translators comment. Next: push main, upload release ZIP to WP.org, add SVN secrets after approval, tag v1.2.12.
